articles.author: Alex Ritman
articles.title: Rami Malek Cries During 8-Minute Cannes Standing Ovation for Ira Sachs’ Gay Drama ‘The Man I Love’ - Variety
articles.description: Rami Malek teams up with Ira Sachs for the queer drama "The Man I Love," one of only two American films competing at Cannes.
articles.content: Rami Malek shed a tear as he soaked up the love in the Palais for his deeply emotional turn in Ira Sachs’ “The Man I Love,” which earned an eight-minute standing ovation Wednesday in Cannes. The film… [+1602 chars]
